FROM (
    SELECT p."ProductVariantId", p."AddedByVendorUserId", p."CreatedAt", p."HeightInCm", p."IsExchange", p."IsReturn", p."LengthInCm", p."MinimuQuantityPerUser", p."Price", p."ProductApprovalStatusId", p."ProductId", p."ProductVariantStatusId", p."SKU", p."UpdatedAt", p."WeightInKgs", p."WidthInCm"
    FROM "ProductVariant" AS p
    WHERE p."IsReturn" = @request_IsReturn_Value
    ORDER BY p."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS p1
INNER JOIN "Product" AS p0 ON p1."ProductId" = p0."ProductId"
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p2 ON p0."ProductSubCategoryId" = p2."ProductSubCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductCategory" AS p3 ON p2."ProductCategoryId" = p3."ProductCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p4 ON p0."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p4."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p4."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
INNER JOIN "VendorUser" AS v ON p1."AddedByVendorUserId" = v."VendorUserId"
INNER JOIN "Vendor" AS v0 ON v."VendorId" = v0."VendorId"
INNER JOIN "ProductStatus" AS p5 ON p1."ProductVariantStatusId" = p5."ProductStatusId"
INNER JOIN "ProductApprovalStatus" AS p6 ON p1."ProductApprovalStatusId" = p6."ProductApprovalStatusId"

    INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p8 ON p7."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p8."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
    INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a0 ON p8."AttributeMasterId" = a0."AttributeMasterId"
) AS s ON p1."ProductVariantId" = s."ProductVariantId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p9."ProductImageId", p9."AddedByVendorUserId", p9."CreatedAt", p9."DisplayOrderId", p9."ImageUrl", p9."IsMainImage", p9."ProductId", p9."ProductVariantId", p9."UpdatedAt", d."DisplayOrderId" AS "DisplayOrderId0", d."DisplayOrderName"
    FROM "ProductImage" AS p9
    INNER JOIN "DisplayOrder" AS d ON p9."DisplayOrderId" = d."DisplayOrderId"
) AS s0 ON p1."ProductVariantId" = s0."ProductVariantId"
LEFT JOIN "Inventory" AS i ON p1."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId"

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Product" AS p
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p0 ON p."ProductSubCategoryId" = p0."ProductSubCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductCategory" AS p1 ON p0."ProductCategoryId" = p1."ProductCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p2 ON p."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p2."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p2."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
WHERE p."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p."ProductStatusId" = 2 AND p0."IsActive" AND p1."IsActive" AND p2."IsActive" AND a."IsActive" AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "ProductVariant" AS p3
    WHERE p."ProductId" = p3."ProductId" AND p3."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p3."ProductVariantStatusId" = 2 AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "Inventory" AS i
        WHERE p3."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId" AND i."AvailableQuantity" > 0) AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p4
        INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p5 ON p4."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p5."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
        INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a0 ON p5."AttributeMasterId" = a0."AttributeMasterId"
        WHERE p3."ProductVariantId" = p4."ProductVariantId" AND (NOT (p5."IsActive") OR NOT (a0."IsActive"))))

s2."AttributeName", s2."CreatedAt1", s2."IsActive1", s2."ProductImageId", s2."AddedByVendorUserId1", s2."CreatedAt2", s2."DisplayOrderId", s2."ImageUrl", s2."IsMainImage", s2."ProductId0", s2."ProductVariantId2", s2."UpdatedAt2", s."AddedByAdminId1", s."AttributeMasterId", s."CreatedAt2", s."IsActive1", s."ProductSubCategoryId1", s."AddedByAdminId2", s."AttributeName", s."CreatedAt3", s."IsActive2"
FROM (
    SELECT p."ProductId", p."AddedByVendorUserId", p."CreatedAt", p."Description", p."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p."ProductApprovalStatusId", p."ProductName", p."ProductStatusId", p."ProductSubCategoryId", p."UpdatedAt", p."VendorId", p0."ProductSubCategoryId" AS "ProductSubCategoryId0", p0."AddedByAdminId", p0."CommissionPercentage", p0."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p0."IsActive", p0."ProductCategoryId", p0."ProductSubCategoryName", p1."ProductCategoryId" AS "ProductCategoryId0", p1."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId0", p1."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt1", p1."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", p1."ProductCategoryName", p2."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p2."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId1", p2."AttributeMasterId", p2."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt2", p2."IsActive" AS "IsActive1", p2."ProductSubCategoryId" AS "ProductSubCategoryId1", a."AttributeMasterId" AS "AttributeMasterId0", a."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId2", a."AttributeName", a."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt3", a."IsActive" AS "IsActive2"
    FROM "Product" AS p
    INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p0 ON p."ProductSubCategoryId" = p0."ProductSubCategoryId"
    INNER JOIN "ProductCategory" AS p1 ON p0."ProductCategoryId" = p1."ProductCategoryId"
    INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p2 ON p."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p2."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
    INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p2."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
    WHERE p."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p."ProductStatusId" = 2 AND p0."IsActive" AND p1."IsActive" AND p2."IsActive" AND a."IsActive" AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "ProductVariant" AS p3
        WHERE p."ProductId" = p3."ProductId" AND p3."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p3."ProductVariantStatusId" = 2 AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM "Inventory" AS i
            WHERE p3."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId" AND i."AvailableQuantity" > 0) AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p4
            INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p5 ON p4."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p5."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
            INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a0 ON p5."AttributeMasterId" = a0."AttributeMasterId"
            WHERE p3."ProductVariantId" = p4."ProductVariantId" AND (NOT (p5."IsActive") OR NOT (a0."IsActive"))))
    ORDER BY p."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS s
INNER JOIN "ProductApprovalStatus" AS p6 ON s."ProductApprovalStatusId" = p6."ProductApprovalStatusId"
INNER JOIN "ProductStatus" AS p7 ON s."ProductStatusId" = p7."ProductStatusId"
INNER JOIN "Vendor" AS v ON s."VendorId" = v."VendorId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p8."ProductImageId", p8."AddedByVendorUserId", p8."CreatedAt", p8."DisplayOrderId", p8."ImageUrl", p8."IsMainImage", p8."ProductId", p8."ProductVariantId", p8."UpdatedAt", d."DisplayOrderId" AS "DisplayOrderId0", d."DisplayOrderName"
    FROM "ProductImage" AS p8
    INNER JOIN "DisplayOrder" AS d ON p8."DisplayOrderId" = d."DisplayOrderId"
) AS s0 ON s."ProductId" = s0."ProductId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p9."ProductVariantId", p9."AddedByVendorUserId", p9."CreatedAt", p9."HeightInCm", p9."IsExchange", p9."IsReturn", p9."LengthInCm", p9."MinimuQuantityPerUser", p9."Price", p9."ProductApprovalStatusId", p9."ProductId", p9."ProductVariantStatusId", p9."SKU", p9."UpdatedAt", p9."WeightInKgs", p9."WidthInCm", i0."InventoryId", i0."AddressId", i0."AvailableQuantity", i0."IsActive", i0."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId0", i0."ReservedQuantity", i0."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", s1."ProductVariantAttributeId", s1."AddedByVendorUserId" AS "AddedByVendorUserId0", s1."AttributeValue", s1."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", s1."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", s1."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", s1."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId1", s1."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt1", s1."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", s1."AddedByAdminId", s1."AttributeMasterId", s1."CreatedAt0" AS "CreatedAt00", s1."IsActive0" AS "IsActive00", s1."ProductSubCategoryId", s1."AttributeMasterId0", s1."AddedByAdminId0", s1."AttributeName", s1."CreatedAt1", s1."IsActive1", p12."ProductImageId", p12."AddedByVendorUserId" AS "AddedByVendorUserId1", p12."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt2", p12."DisplayOrderId", p12."ImageUrl", p12."IsMainImage", p12."ProductId" AS "ProductId0", p12."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId2", p12."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt2"
    FROM "ProductVariant" AS p9
    LEFT JOIN "Inventory" AS i0 ON p9."ProductVariantId" = i0."ProductVariantId"
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p10."ProductVariantAttributeId", p10."AddedByVendorUserId", p10."AttributeValue", p10."CreatedAt", p10."IsActive", p10."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p10."ProductVariantId", p10."UpdatedAt", p11."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" AS "ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", p11."AddedByAdminId", p11."AttributeMasterId", p11."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p11."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", p11."ProductSubCategoryId", a1."AttributeMasterId" AS "AttributeMasterId0", a1."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId0", a1."AttributeName", a1."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt1", a1."IsActive" AS "IsActive1"
        FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p10
        INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p11 ON p10."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p11."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
        INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a1 ON p11."AttributeMasterId" = a1."AttributeMasterId"
    ) AS s1 ON p9."ProductVariantId" = s1."ProductVariantId"
    LEFT JOIN "ProductImage" AS p12 ON p9."ProductVariantId" = p12."ProductVariantId"
) AS s2 ON s."ProductId" = s2."ProductId"
ORDER BY s."CreatedAt" DESC, s."ProductId", s."ProductSubCategoryId0", s."ProductCategoryId0", s."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", s."AttributeMasterId0", p6."ProductApprovalStatusId", p7."ProductStatusId", v."VendorId", s0."ProductImageId", s0."DisplayOrderId0", s2."ProductVariantId", s2."InventoryId", s2."ProductVariantAttributeId", s2."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", s2."AttributeMasterId0"

s1."ProductImageId", s1."AddedByVendorUserId", s1."CreatedAt", s1."DisplayOrderId", s1."ImageUrl", s1."IsMainImage", s1."ProductId", s1."ProductVariantId", s1."UpdatedAt", s1."DisplayOrderId0", s1."DisplayOrderName", i."InventoryId", i."AddressId", i."AvailableQuantity", i."IsActive", i."ProductVariantId", i."ReservedQuantity", i."UpdatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT p."ProductVariantId", p."AddedByVendorUserId", p."CreatedAt", p."HeightInCm", p."IsExchange", p."IsReturn", p."LengthInCm", p."MinimuQuantityPerUser", p."Price", p."ProductApprovalStatusId", p."ProductId", p."ProductVariantStatusId", p."SKU", p."UpdatedAt", p."WeightInKgs", p."WidthInCm", p0."ProductId" AS "ProductId0", p0."AddedByVendorUserId" AS "AddedByVendorUserId0", p0."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p0."Description", p0."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p0."ProductApprovalStatusId" AS "ProductApprovalStatusId0", p0."ProductName", p0."ProductStatusId", p0."ProductSubCategoryId", p0."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", p0."VendorId"
    FROM "ProductVariant" AS p
    INNER JOIN "Product" AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."ProductId"
    WHERE p0."VendorId" = @vendorid AND p."IsReturn" = @request_IsReturn_Value
    ORDER BY p."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p
) AS s
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p1 ON s."ProductSubCategoryId" = p1."ProductSubCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductCategory" AS p2 ON p1."ProductCategoryId" = p2."ProductCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p3 ON s."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p3."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p3."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
INNER JOIN "VendorUser" AS v ON s."AddedByVendorUserId" = v."VendorUserId"
INNER JOIN "Vendor" AS v0 ON v."VendorId" = v0."VendorId"
INNER JOIN "User" AS u ON v."UserId" = u."UserId"
INNER JOIN "ProductStatus" AS p4 ON s."ProductVariantStatusId" = p4."ProductStatusId"
INNER JOIN "ProductApprovalStatus" AS p5 ON s."ProductApprovalStatusId" = p5."ProductApprovalStatusId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p6."ProductVariantAttributeId", p6."AddedByVendorUserId", p6."AttributeValue", p6."CreatedAt", p6."IsActive", p6."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p6."ProductVariantId", p6."UpdatedAt", p7."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" AS "ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", p7."AddedByAdminId", p7."AttributeMasterId", p7."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p7."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", p7."ProductSubCategoryId", a0."AttributeMasterId" AS "AttributeMasterId0", a0."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId0", a0."AttributeName", a0."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt1", a0."IsActive" AS "IsActive1"
    FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p6
    INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p7 ON p6."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p7."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
    INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a0 ON p7."AttributeMasterId" = a0."AttributeMasterId"
) AS s0 ON s."ProductVariantId" = s0."ProductVariantId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p8."ProductImageId", p8."AddedByVendorUserId", p8."CreatedAt", p8."DisplayOrderId", p8."ImageUrl", p8."IsMainImage", p8."ProductId", p8."ProductVariantId", p8."UpdatedAt", d."DisplayOrderId" AS "DisplayOrderId0", d."DisplayOrderName"
    FROM "ProductImage" AS p8
    INNER JOIN "DisplayOrder" AS d ON p8."DisplayOrderId" = d."DisplayOrderId"
) AS s1 ON s."ProductVariantId" = s1."ProductVariantId"
LEFT JOIN "Inventory" AS i ON s."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId"
ORDER BY s."CreatedAt" DESC, s."ProductVariantId", s."ProductId0", p1."ProductSubCategoryId", p2."ProductCategoryId", p3."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", a."AttributeMasterId", v."VendorUserId", v0."VendorId", u."UserId", p4."ProductStatusId", p5."ProductApprovalStatusId", s0."ProductVariantAttributeId", s0."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", s0."AttributeMasterId0", s1."ProductImageId", s1."DisplayOrderId0"

    INNER JOIN "Product" AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."ProductId"
    WHERE p0."VendorId" = @vendorid AND p."IsReturn" = @request_IsReturn_Value
    ORDER BY p."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p
) AS s
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p1 ON s."ProductSubCategoryId" = p1."ProductSubCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductCategory" AS p2 ON p1."ProductCategoryId" = p2."ProductCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p3 ON s."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p3."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p3."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
INNER JOIN "VendorUser" AS v ON s."AddedByVendorUserId" = v."VendorUserId"
INNER JOIN "Vendor" AS v0 ON v."VendorId" = v0."VendorId"
INNER JOIN "User" AS u ON v."UserId" = u."UserId"
INNER JOIN "ProductStatus" AS p4 ON s."ProductVariantStatusId" = p4."ProductStatusId"
INNER JOIN "ProductApprovalStatus" AS p5 ON s."ProductApprovalStatusId" = p5."ProductApprovalStatusId"

    SELECT p6."ProductVariantAttributeId", p6."AddedByVendorUserId", p6."AttributeValue", p6."CreatedAt", p6."IsActive", p6."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p6."ProductVariantId", p6."UpdatedAt", p7."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" AS "ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", p7."AddedByAdminId", p7."AttributeMasterId", p7."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p7."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", p7."ProductSubCategoryId", a0."AttributeMasterId" AS "AttributeMasterId0", a0."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId0", a0."AttributeName", a0."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt1", a0."IsActive" AS "IsActive1"
    FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p6
    INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p7 ON p6."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p7."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
    INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a0 ON p7."AttributeMasterId" = a0."AttributeMasterId"
) AS s0 ON s."ProductVariantId" = s0."ProductVariantId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p8."ProductImageId", p8."AddedByVendorUserId", p8."CreatedAt", p8."DisplayOrderId", p8."ImageUrl", p8."IsMainImage", p8."ProductId", p8."ProductVariantId", p8."UpdatedAt", d."DisplayOrderId" AS "DisplayOrderId0", d."DisplayOrderName"
    FROM "ProductImage" AS p8
    INNER JOIN "DisplayOrder" AS d ON p8."DisplayOrderId" = d."DisplayOrderId"
) AS s1 ON s."ProductVariantId" = s1."ProductVariantId"
LEFT JOIN "Inventory" AS i ON s."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId"
ORDER BY s."CreatedAt" DESC, s."ProductVariantId", s."ProductId0", p1."ProductSubCategoryId", p2."ProductCategoryId", p3."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", a."AttributeMasterId", v."VendorUserId", v0."VendorId", u."UserId", p4."ProductStatusId", p5."ProductApprovalStatusId", s0."ProductVariantAttributeId", s0."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", s0."AttributeMasterId0", s1."ProductImageId", s1."DisplayOrderId0"

SELECT c."CouponId", c."CouponCode", c."CouponDescription", c."CouponTypeId", c."CreatedAt", c."CreatedByUserId", c."DiscountValue", c."EndDate", c."IsActive", c."MinimumNumberOfUsage", c."MinimumOrderAmount", c."StartDate", c."UpdatedAt", s."CouponsProductId", s."AddedByVendorUserId", s."CouponId", s."CreatedAt", s."IsActive", s."ProductId", s."UpdatedAt", s."ProductId0", s."AddedByVendorUserId0", s."CreatedAt0", s."Description", s."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId", s."ProductApprovalStatusId", s."ProductName", s."ProductStatusId", s."ProductSubCategoryId", s."UpdatedAt0", s."VendorId", s0."CouponUsageId", s0."CouponId", s0."OrderId", s0."UsedAt", s0."OrderId0", s0."AddressId", s0."CreatedAt", s0."FinalAmount", s0."OrderDate", s0."OrderNumber", s0."OrderStatusId", s0."TotalCouponAmount", s0."TotalProductAmount", s0."TotalShippingAmount", s0."UpdatedAt", s0."UserId"
FROM "Coupons" AS c
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT c0."CouponsProductId", c0."AddedByVendorUserId", c0."CouponId", c0."CreatedAt", c0."IsActive", c0."ProductId", c0."UpdatedAt", p."ProductId" AS "ProductId0", p."AddedByVendorUserId" AS "AddedByVendorUserId0", p."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p."Description", p."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p."ProductApprovalStatusId", p."ProductName", p."ProductStatusId", p."ProductSubCategoryId", p."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", p."VendorId"
    FROM "CouponsProduct" AS c0
    INNER JOIN "Product" AS p ON c0."ProductId" = p."ProductId"
) AS s ON c."CouponId" = s."CouponId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT c1."CouponUsageId", c1."CouponId", c1."OrderId", c1."UsedAt", o."OrderId" AS "OrderId0", o."AddressId", o."CreatedAt", o."FinalAmount", o."OrderDate", o."OrderNumber", o."OrderStatusId", o."TotalCouponAmount", o."TotalProductAmount", o."TotalShippingAmount", o."UpdatedAt", o."UserId"
    FROM "CouponUsage" AS c1
    INNER JOIN "Order" AS o ON c1."OrderId" = o."OrderId"
) AS s0 ON c."CouponId" = s0."CouponId"
WHERE c."IsActive" AND c."StartDate" <= now()::timestamp AND c."EndDate" >= now()::timestamp
ORDER BY c."CouponId", s."CouponsProductId", s."ProductId0", s0."CouponUsageId"

u."UpdatedAt", p4."ProductStatusId", p4."ProductStatusName", p5."ProductApprovalStatusId", p5."ProductApprovalStatusName", s0."ProductVariantAttributeId", s0."AddedByVendorUserId", s0."AttributeMasterId", s0."CreatedAt0", s0."IsActive0", s0."ProductSubCategoryId", s0."AttributeMasterId0", s0."AddedByAdminId0", s0."AttributeName", s0."CreatedAt1", s0."IsActive1", s1."ProductImageId", s1."AddedByVendorUserId", s1."CreatedAt", s1."DisplayOrderId", s1."ImageUrl", s1."IsMainImage", s1."ProductId", s1."ProductVariantId", s1."UpdatedAt", s1."DisplayOrderId0", s1."DisplayOrderName", i."InventoryId", i."AddressId", i."AvailableQuantity", i."IsActive", i."ProductVariantId", i."ReservedQuantity", i."UpdatedAt"
FROM (
    SELECT p."ProductVariantId", p."AddedByVendorUserId", p."CreatedAt", p."HeightInCm", p."IsExchange", p."IsReturn", p."LengthInCm", p."MinimuQuantityPerUser", p."Price", p."ProductApprovalStatusId", p."ProductId", p."ProductVariantStatusId", p."SKU", p."UpdatedAt", p."WeightInKgs", p."WidthInCm", p0."ProductId" AS "ProductId0", p0."AddedByVendorUserId" AS "AddedByVendorUserId0", p0."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p0."Description", p0."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p0."ProductApprovalStatusId" AS "ProductApprovalStatusId0", p0."ProductName", p0."ProductStatusId", p0."ProductSubCategoryId", p0."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", p0."VendorId"
    FROM "ProductVariant" AS p
    INNER JOIN "Product" AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."ProductId"
    WHERE p0."VendorId" = @vendorid AND p."IsReturn" = @request_IsReturn_Value
    ORDER BY p."CreatedAt" DESC
    LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p
) AS s
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p1 ON s."ProductSubCategoryId" = p1."ProductSubCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductCategory" AS p2 ON p1."ProductCategoryId" = p2."ProductCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p3 ON s."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p3."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p3."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
INNER JOIN "VendorUser" AS v ON s."AddedByVendorUserId" = v."VendorUserId"
INNER JOIN "Vendor" AS v0 ON v."VendorId" = v0."VendorId"
INNER JOIN "User" AS u ON v."UserId" = u."UserId"
INNER JOIN "ProductStatus" AS p4 ON s."ProductVariantStatusId" = p4."ProductStatusId"
INNER JOIN "ProductApprovalStatus" AS p5 ON s."ProductApprovalStatusId" = p5."ProductApprovalStatusId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p6."ProductVariantAttributeId", p6."AddedByVendorUserId", p6."AttributeValue", p6."CreatedAt", p6."IsActive", p6."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p6."ProductVariantId", p6."UpdatedAt", p7."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" AS "ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", p7."AddedByAdminId", p7."AttributeMasterId", p7."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p7."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", p7."ProductSubCategoryId", a0."AttributeMasterId" AS "AttributeMasterId0", a0."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId0", a0."AttributeName", a0."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt1", a0."IsActive" AS "IsActive1"
    FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p6
    INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p7 ON p6."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p7."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
    INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a0 ON p7."AttributeMasterId" = a0."AttributeMasterId"
) AS s0 ON s."ProductVariantId" = s0."ProductVariantId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p8."ProductImageId", p8."AddedByVendorUserId", p8."CreatedAt", p8."DisplayOrderId", p8."ImageUrl", p8."IsMainImage", p8."ProductId", p8."ProductVariantId", p8."UpdatedAt", d."DisplayOrderId" AS "DisplayOrderId0", d."DisplayOrderName"
    FROM "ProductImage" AS p8
    INNER JOIN "DisplayOrder" AS d ON p8."DisplayOrderId" = d."DisplayOrderId"
) AS s1 ON s."ProductVariantId" = s1."ProductVariantId"
LEFT JOIN "Inventory" AS i ON s."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId"
ORDER BY s."CreatedAt" DESC, s."ProductVariantId", s."ProductId0", p1."ProductSubCategoryId", p2."ProductCategoryId", p3."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", a."AttributeMasterId", v."VendorUserId", v0."VendorId", u."UserId", p4."ProductStatusId", p5."ProductApprovalStatusId", s0."ProductVariantAttributeId", s0."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", s0."AttributeMasterId0", s1."ProductImageId", s1."DisplayOrderId0"

) AS s

INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p4 ON p0."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p4."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p4."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"

) AS s
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p1 ON s."ProductSubCategoryId" = p1."ProductSubCategoryId"

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Product" AS p
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p0 ON p."ProductSubCategoryId" = p0."ProductSubCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductCategory" AS p1 ON p0."ProductCategoryId" = p1."ProductCategoryId"
INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p2 ON p."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p2."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p2."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
WHERE p."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p."ProductStatusId" = 2 AND p0."IsActive" AND p1."IsActive" AND p2."IsActive" AND a."IsActive" AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "ProductVariant" AS p3
    WHERE p."ProductId" = p3."ProductId" AND p3."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p3."ProductVariantStatusId" = 2 AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "Inventory" AS i
        INNER JOIN "Address" AS a0 ON i."AddressId" = a0."AddressId"
        WHERE p3."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId" AND i."AvailableQuantity" > 0 AND a0."IsActive") AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p4
        INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p5 ON p4."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p5."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"

SELECT c."CartItemsId", c."CartId", c."ProductVariantId", c."Qunatity", c0."CartId", c0."UserId", p."ProductVariantId", p."AddedByVendorUserId", p."CreatedAt", p."HeightInCm", p."IsExchange", p."IsReturn", p."LengthInCm", p."MinimuQuantityPerUser", p."Price", p."ProductApprovalStatusId", p."ProductId", p."ProductVariantStatusId", p."SKU", p."UpdatedAt", p."WeightInKgs", p."WidthInCm", p0."ProductId", p0."AddedByVendorUserId", p0."CreatedAt", p0."Description", p0."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p0."ProductApprovalStatusId", p0."ProductName", p0."ProductStatusId", p0."ProductSubCategoryId", p0."UpdatedAt", p0."VendorId", s."InventoryId", s."AddressId", s."AvailableQuantity", s."IsActive", s."ProductVariantId", s."ReservedQuantity", s."UpdatedAt", s."AddressId0", s."AddressLine", s."City", s."ContactName", s."ContactPhoneNumber", s."Country", s."CreatedAt", s."IsActive0", s."IsDefault", s."LandMark", s."PinCode", s."State", s."UpdatedAt0", s."UserId"
FROM "CartItems" AS c
INNER JOIN "Cart" AS c0 ON c."CartId" = c0."CartId"
INNER JOIN "ProductVariant" AS p ON c."ProductVariantId" = p."ProductVariantId"
INNER JOIN "Product" AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."ProductId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i."InventoryId", i."AddressId", i."AvailableQuantity", i."IsActive", i."ProductVariantId", i."ReservedQuantity", i."UpdatedAt", a."AddressId" AS "AddressId0", a."AddressLine", a."City", a."ContactName", a."ContactPhoneNumber", a."Country", a."CreatedAt", a."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", a."IsDefault", a."LandMark", a."PinCode", a."State", a."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", a."UserId"
    FROM "Inventory" AS i
    INNER JOIN "Address" AS a ON i."AddressId" = a."AddressId"
) AS s ON p."ProductVariantId" = s."ProductVariantId"
WHERE c0."UserId" = @userId
ORDER BY c."CartItemsId", c0."CartId", p."ProductVariantId", p0."ProductId", s."InventoryId"

    INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p0 ON p."ProductSubCategoryId" = p0."ProductSubCategoryId"
    INNER JOIN "ProductCategory" AS p1 ON p0."ProductCategoryId" = p1."ProductCategoryId"

    INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p2."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
    INNER JOIN "ProductApprovalStatus" AS p6 ON p."ProductApprovalStatusId" = p6."ProductApprovalStatusId"
    INNER JOIN "ProductStatus" AS p7 ON p."ProductStatusId" = p7."ProductStatusId"
    INNER JOIN "Vendor" AS v ON p."VendorId" = v."VendorId"

        WHERE p."ProductId" = p3."ProductId" AND p3."ProductVariantId" = @ProductVariantId AND p3."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p3."ProductVariantStatusId" = 2 AND EXISTS (

            WHERE p3."ProductVariantId" = p4."ProductVariantId" AND (NOT (p5."IsActive") OR NOT (a0."IsActive"))))
    LIMIT 1
) AS s

FROM (
    SELECT p."ProductId", p."AddedByVendorUserId", p."CreatedAt", p."Description", p."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p."ProductApprovalStatusId", p."ProductName", p."ProductStatusId", p."ProductSubCategoryId", p."UpdatedAt", p."VendorId", p6."ProductApprovalStatusId" AS "ProductApprovalStatusId0", p6."ProductApprovalStatusName", p7."ProductStatusId" AS "ProductStatusId0", p7."ProductStatusName", p0."ProductSubCategoryId" AS "ProductSubCategoryId0", p0."AddedByAdminId", p0."CommissionPercentage", p0."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p0."IsActive", p0."ProductCategoryId", p0."ProductSubCategoryName", p1."ProductCategoryId" AS "ProductCategoryId0", p1."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId0", p1."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt1", p1."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", p1."ProductCategoryName", v."VendorId" AS "VendorId0", v."ApprovalStatusId", v."CompanyEmail", v."CompanyPhoneNumber", v."ContactPersonName", v."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt2", v."GSTNumber", v."IsActive" AS "IsActive1", v."ReviewedAt", v."ReviewedByAdminId", v."VendorCompanyName", v0."VendorUserId", v0."AddedByVendorUserId" AS "AddedByVendorUserId0", v0."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt3", v0."IsActive" AS "IsActive2", v0."UserId", v0."VendorId" AS "VendorId1", v0."VendorRoleId", u."UserId" AS "UserId0", u."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt4", u."Email", u."FirstName", u."HashedKey", u."IsActive" AS "IsActive3", u."LastName", u."Password", u."PhoneNumber", u."RoleId", u."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", p2."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p2."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId1", p2."AttributeMasterId", p2."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt5", p2."IsActive" AS "IsActive4", p2."ProductSubCategoryId" AS "ProductSubCategoryId1", a."AttributeMasterId" AS "AttributeMasterId0", a."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId2", a."AttributeName", a."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt6", a."IsActive" AS "IsActive5"
    FROM "Product" AS p
    INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategory" AS p0 ON p."ProductSubCategoryId" = p0."ProductSubCategoryId"
    INNER JOIN "ProductCategory" AS p1 ON p0."ProductCategoryId" = p1."ProductCategoryId"
    INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p2 ON p."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p2."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
    INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p2."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
    INNER JOIN "ProductApprovalStatus" AS p6 ON p."ProductApprovalStatusId" = p6."ProductApprovalStatusId"
    INNER JOIN "ProductStatus" AS p7 ON p."ProductStatusId" = p7."ProductStatusId"
    INNER JOIN "Vendor" AS v ON p."VendorId" = v."VendorId"
    INNER JOIN "VendorUser" AS v0 ON p."AddedByVendorUserId" = v0."VendorUserId"
    INNER JOIN "User" AS u ON v0."UserId" = u."UserId"
    WHERE p."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p."ProductStatusId" = 2 AND p0."IsActive" AND p1."IsActive" AND p2."IsActive" AND a."IsActive" AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "ProductVariant" AS p3
        WHERE p."ProductId" = p3."ProductId" AND p3."ProductVariantId" = @ProductVariantId AND p3."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p3."ProductVariantStatusId" = 2 AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM "Inventory" AS i
            WHERE p3."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId" AND i."AvailableQuantity" > @Qunatity) AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p4
            INNER JOIN "ProductSubCategoryAttribute" AS p5 ON p4."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" = p5."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId"
            INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a0 ON p5."AttributeMasterId" = a0."AttributeMasterId"
            WHERE p3."ProductVariantId" = p4."ProductVariantId" AND (NOT (p5."IsActive") OR NOT (a0."IsActive"))))
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p8."ProductImageId", p8."AddedByVendorUserId", p8."CreatedAt", p8."DisplayOrderId", p8."ImageUrl", p8."IsMainImage", p8."ProductId", p8."ProductVariantId", p8."UpdatedAt", d."DisplayOrderId" AS "DisplayOrderId0", d."DisplayOrderName"
    FROM "ProductImage" AS p8
    INNER JOIN "DisplayOrder" AS d ON p8."DisplayOrderId" = d."DisplayOrderId"
) AS s0 ON s."ProductId" = s0."ProductId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p9."ProductVariantId", p9."AddedByVendorUserId", p9."CreatedAt", p9."HeightInCm", p9."IsExchange", p9."IsReturn", p9."LengthInCm", p9."MinimuQuantityPerUser", p9."Price", p9."ProductApprovalStatusId", p9."ProductId", p9."ProductVariantStatusId", p9."SKU", p9."UpdatedAt", p9."WeightInKgs", p9."WidthInCm", s1."InventoryId", s1."AddressId", s1."AvailableQuantity", s1."IsActive", s1."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId0", s1."ReservedQuantity", s1."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", s1."AddressId0", s1."AddressLine", s1."City", s1."ContactName", s1."ContactPhoneNumber", s1."Country", s1."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", s1."IsActive0", s1."IsDefault", s1."LandMark", s1."PinCode", s1."State", s1."UpdatedAt0" AS "UpdatedAt00", s1."UserId", s2."ProductVariantAttributeId", s2."AddedByVendorUserId" AS "AddedByVendorUserId0", s2."AttributeValue", s2."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt1", s2."IsActive" AS "IsActive1", s2."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", s2."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId1", s2."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt1", s2."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", s2."AddedByAdminId", s2."AttributeMasterId", s2."CreatedAt0" AS "CreatedAt00", s2."IsActive0" AS "IsActive00", s2."ProductSubCategoryId", s2."AttributeMasterId0", s2."AddedByAdminId0", s2."AttributeName", s2."CreatedAt1" AS "CreatedAt10", s2."IsActive1" AS "IsActive10", p12."ProductImageId", p12."AddedByVendorUserId" AS "AddedByVendorUserId1", p12."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt2", p12."DisplayOrderId", p12."ImageUrl", p12."IsMainImage", p12."ProductId" AS "ProductId0", p12."ProductVariantId" AS "ProductVariantId2", p12."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt2"
    FROM "ProductVariant" AS p9
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT i0."InventoryId", i0."AddressId", i0."AvailableQuantity", i0."IsActive", i0."ProductVariantId", i0."ReservedQuantity", i0."UpdatedAt", a1."AddressId" AS "AddressId0", a1."AddressLine", a1."City", a1."ContactName", a1."ContactPhoneNumber", a1."Country", a1."CreatedAt", a1."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", a1."IsDefault", a1."LandMark", a1."PinCode", a1."State", a1."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", a1."UserId"
        FROM "Inventory" AS i0
        INNER JOIN "Address" AS a1 ON i0."AddressId" = a1."AddressId"
    ) AS s1 ON p9."ProductVariantId" = s1."ProductVariantId"
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p10."ProductVariantAttributeId", p10."AddedByVendorUserId", p10."AttributeValue", p10."CreatedAt", p10."IsActive", p10."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p10."ProductVariantId", p10."UpdatedAt", p11."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId" AS "ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", p11."AddedByAdminId", p11."AttributeMasterId", p11."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p11."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", p11."ProductSubCategoryId", a2."AttributeMasterId" AS "AttributeMasterId0", a2."AddedByAdminId" AS "AddedByAdminId0", a2."AttributeName", a2."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt1", a2."IsActive" AS "IsActive1"

        INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a2 ON p11."AttributeMasterId" = a2."AttributeMasterId"
    ) AS s2 ON p9."ProductVariantId" = s2."ProductVariantId"
    LEFT JOIN "ProductImage" AS p12 ON p9."ProductVariantId" = p12."ProductVariantId"
) AS s3 ON s."ProductId" = s3."ProductId"
ORDER BY s."ProductId", s."ProductSubCategoryId0", s."ProductCategoryId0", s."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId", s."AttributeMasterId0", s."ProductApprovalStatusId0", s."ProductStatusId0", s."VendorId0", s."VendorUserId", s."UserId0", s0."ProductImageId", s0."DisplayOrderId0", s3."ProductVariantId", s3."InventoryId", s3."AddressId0", s3."ProductVariantAttributeId", s3."ProductSubCategoryAttributeId0", s3."AttributeMasterId0"

SELECT c."CartItemsId", c."CartId", c."ProductVariantId", c."Qunatity", c0."CartId", c0."UserId", p."ProductVariantId", p."AddedByVendorUserId", p."CreatedAt", p."HeightInCm", p."IsExchange", p."IsReturn", p."LengthInCm", p."MinimuQuantityPerUser", p."Price", p."ProductApprovalStatusId", p."ProductId", p."ProductVariantStatusId", p."SKU", p."UpdatedAt", p."WeightInKgs", p."WidthInCm", p0."ProductId", p0."AddedByVendorUserId", p0."CreatedAt", p0."Description", p0."MainProductSubCategoryAttributeId", p0."ProductApprovalStatusId", p0."ProductName", p0."ProductStatusId", p0."ProductSubCategoryId", p0."UpdatedAt", p0."VendorId", s."InventoryId", s."AddressId", s."AvailableQuantity", s."IsActive", s."ProductVariantId", s."ReservedQuantity", s."UpdatedAt", s."AddressId0", s."AddressLine", s."City", s."ContactName", s."ContactPhoneNumber", s."Country", s."CreatedAt", s."IsActive0", s."IsDefault", s."LandMark", s."PinCode", s."State", s."UpdatedAt0", s."UserId"
FROM "CartItems" AS c
INNER JOIN "Cart" AS c0 ON c."CartId" = c0."CartId"
INNER JOIN "ProductVariant" AS p ON c."ProductVariantId" = p."ProductVariantId"
INNER JOIN "Product" AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."ProductId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i."InventoryId", i."AddressId", i."AvailableQuantity", i."IsActive", i."ProductVariantId", i."ReservedQuantity", i."UpdatedAt", a."AddressId" AS "AddressId0", a."AddressLine", a."City", a."ContactName", a."ContactPhoneNumber", a."Country", a."CreatedAt", a."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", a."IsDefault", a."LandMark", a."PinCode", a."State", a."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", a."UserId"
    FROM "Inventory" AS i
    INNER JOIN "Address" AS a ON i."AddressId" = a."AddressId"
) AS s ON p."ProductVariantId" = s."ProductVariantId"
WHERE c0."UserId" = @userId
ORDER BY c."CartItemsId", c0."CartId", p."ProductVariantId", p0."ProductId", s."InventoryId"

INNER JOIN "Product" AS p0 ON p."ProductId" = p0."ProductId"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT i."InventoryId", i."AddressId", i."AvailableQuantity", i."IsActive", i."ProductVariantId", i."ReservedQuantity", i."UpdatedAt", a."AddressId" AS "AddressId0", a."AddressLine", a."City", a."ContactName", a."ContactPhoneNumber", a."Country", a."CreatedAt", a."IsActive" AS "IsActive0", a."IsDefault", a."LandMark", a."PinCode", a."State", a."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0", a."UserId"
    FROM "Inventory" AS i
    INNER JOIN "Address" AS a ON i."AddressId" = a."AddressId"
) AS s ON p."ProductVariantId" = s."ProductVariantId"
WHERE c0."UserId" = @userId
ORDER BY c."CartItemsId", c0."CartId", p."ProductVariantId", p0."ProductId", s."InventoryId"

    INNER JOIN "ProductCategory" AS p1 ON p0."ProductCategoryId" = p1."ProductCategoryId"

    INNER JOIN "AttributeMaster" AS a ON p2."AttributeMasterId" = a."AttributeMasterId"
    INNER JOIN "ProductApprovalStatus" AS p6 ON p."ProductApprovalStatusId" = p6."ProductApprovalStatusId"
    INNER JOIN "ProductStatus" AS p7 ON p."ProductStatusId" = p7."ProductStatusId"

        FROM "ProductVariant" AS p3
        WHERE p."ProductId" = p3."ProductId" AND p3."ProductVariantId" = @ProductVariantId AND p3."ProductApprovalStatusId" = 4 AND p3."ProductVariantStatusId" = 2 AND EXISTS (

            FROM "Inventory" AS i
            WHERE p3."ProductVariantId" = i."ProductVariantId" AND i."AvailableQuantity" > @Qunatity) AND NOT EXISTS (

            FROM "ProductVariantAttribute" AS p4

) AS s
